info.title: BodyLoop API
info.description:
This API is the backend of the BodyLoop.
        It enables a client to steer the BodyLoop Scan Unit, work with the internal data management and analyze the system.

get.description:
Returns information about the BodyLoop. Inclued hirarchic sub states and combined states.
    
**General_State**         A general combined State
    
**Backend_State**         Contains information about the Backend (disk_usage)
    
**Initialization_State**  Contains information about the system initialization
    
**Acquisition_State**     Contains state about the Scan Unit

post.description:
Resets (parts of) the system to factory state
    
**dongle_serial** This must correspond to the imprinted serial number of the dongle.
    
**data**          Data falg of factory-reset for system independant data (i.e. probands, viatars, ...)
    
**system**        System flag of factory-reset for system dependant data (i.e. initializations, ...)
    
**user**          System flag of factory-reset for API users
Generates and retruns an archive for system diagnostics

schema.title: Response Get Initializations Api V2 System Initializations  Get

get.description: Returns the initialization status of the specified scanner_init_id

schema.title: Response Get Initialization Status Api V2 System Initializations  Scanner Init Id  Targets Get

post.description:
Triggers the initialisation process for scanner_init_id
   
Supported target_kind is 'init'

   After starting the initialization. The progress of the initialization (targets) should be requested and instructions be followed.

schema.title: Response Start Target Creation Api V2 System Initializations  Scanner Init Id  Targets Post
Response Get Probands Api V2 Probands  Get

get.description:
Read a proband (C**R**UD)
The response contains proband data and related viatars.

schema.title: Response Get Viatars Api V2 Viatars  Get
Response Delete Viatar Api V2 Viatars  Viatar Id  Delete

post.description: Generates and returns an archive with infomation of the viatar
Generates and returns an archive with infomation of the viatar

schema.title: Response Get Targets Api V2 Viatars  Viatar Id  Targets  Get

post.description:
Triggers target creation of a specific 'target_kind'
    
 The targets have a hierarchical dependency to each other. It is not neccessary, but possible to trigger each taget seperat.
    To create the target 'analyzed_avatar_3d' it is only neccessary to trigger the target createion of this target_kind. All dependant targets will be triggered automaticaly, if not 'Ready'.
    
**imageset_2d**           -> A set of images are captured, using a BodyLoop Scan Device.                                 *(Results can be accessed under 'images' endpoints)*
    
**coarse_pointcloud_3d**  -> A spares pointcloud of the captured scene.                                 *(Results can be accessed under 'models' endpoints)*
    
**mesh_3d**               -> A 3d reconstruction of the captured scene.                                 *(Results can be accessed under 'models' endpoints)*
    
**avatar_3d**             -> A 3d modeled avatar of the 3d reconstruction.                                 *(Results can be accessed under 'models' endpoints)*
    
**analyzed_avatar_3d**    -> Automatic analyzation of the modeled avatar.                                 *(Results can be accessed under 'markers_and_measures' and 'series' endpoints)*
    
**report**                -> A first report of the analyzation and the modeled avatar.                                 *(Results can be accessed under 'reports' endpoints)*

schema.title: Response Start Target Creation Api V2 Viatars  Viatar Id  Targets  Post
Response Upload Mesh 3D Api V2 Viatars  Viatar Id  Targets Mesh 3D Post
Response Upload Imageset 2D Api V2 Viatars  Viatar Id  Targets Imageset 2D Post

get.description: Returns image_names and url_paths of the matching viatar

Returns model_names and url_paths of the matching viatar

get.description: Returns the crosssection series of the matching viatar and series_paths

get.description: Convert coordinates form 'series' system into cartesian system

MarkerDetail.title: MarkerDetail

Meta.description: Meta information used by various classes

Preset.description: Extended version of `PresetData` that includes unique preset_id and meta information.

Proband.title: Proband
Proband.description: Extended version of `ProbandData` that includes unique proband_id and meta information.

ProbandDetail.title: ProbandDetail
ProbandDetail.description: Extended version of `Proband` that includes matching reffering Viatars

Report.title: Report
Report.description: Extended version of `ReportData` that includes unique report_id and meta information.

ScannerInitalization.title: ScannerInitalization
ScannerInitalization.description:
Extended version of `ScannerInitalizationData`,
    that includes unique scanner_init_id and meta information.

System.title: System
System.description: Extended version of `SystemDb` that includes meta information and all read-only settings.

SystemData.title: SystemData
SystemData.description: Extended version of `SystemDb` that includes meta information and all read-only settings.

SystemOs.title: SystemOs
SystemOs.description: Extended version of `SystemOsData` that includes all os read-only settings.

Viatar.title: Viatar
Viatar.description: Extended version of `ViatarData` that includes unique viatar_id and meta information.

tags.name: parameters
tags.description: These endpoints enable parameters management (CRUD).            These parameters can be used at the viatar endpoints.

tags.name: viatars
tags.description: These endpoints relate to the 'viatar' (CRUD).             A 'viatar' includes target-, measurement- and other data.            The 'targets' endpoints enable the capturing of a imageset,             computation of 3d models and automatic analyzation and reporting.

tags.name: images
tags.description: Images of a Viatar can be read with these endpoints.

tags.name: models
tags.description: Models of a Viatar can be read with these endpoints.

tags.name: markers_and_measures
tags.description: These endpoints enable the interaction with markers,            heights, distances and crosssections

tags.name: series
tags.description: These endpoints deliver avatar data it the context of podyparts.

tags.name: presets
tags.description: These endpoints enable the deriving and managing of presets.

tags.name: reports
tags.description: Reports management can be dones via these endpoints.

tags.name: authentification
tags.description: These endpoints enable the user management of the API.                        API login and authentification is also implemented in these endpoints.
